steps.title: Identify the triangle type
steps.content: From the figure, the triangle has a right angle and two legs of equal length 15. A triangle with a right angle and two equal legs is an isosceles right triangle. In an isosceles right triangle, the two non-right angles are equal and must sum to 90°, so each measures 45°.

steps.title: Find x
steps.content: The triangle is a 45-45-90 right triangle, so $x = 45$.
